'''Arporatal-Lanin''' was a rugged [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Arporatal-Lanin system/Legends|Arporatal-Lanin system]] of the [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]], a part of the [[Senex-Juvex/Legends|Senex-Juvex]] region in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. A [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] connected it to the [[Thull's Vault system/Legends|Thull's Vault system]]. Arporatal-Lanin's surface featured jagged, tumbled ranges of [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]] as well as deep, [[Forest/Legends|forested]] valleys.<ref name="TEA" />

Arporatal-Lanin was under the control of the [[Noble/Legends|aristocratic]] [[Ancient Houses]] of the Senex-Juvex and was known for its [[Homeworld/Legends|native]]<ref name="TEA" /> [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> known as the [[Arpor-Lan]]s, who excelled as [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]], trackers, and [[Scout/Legends|scouts]].<ref name="TEA" /> The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] scout [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Deeve]] was an Arpor-Lan from Arporatal-Lanin, where he learned numerous valuable skills related to scouting and tracking.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Arporatal-Lanin was first mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed it in grid square K-18.<ref name="TEA" />
